title: Bloomery
description: Increase the melee damage of all non-siege units by +1.

title: Decarbonization
description: Increase the melee damage of all non-siege units by +1.

title: Damascus Steel
description: Increase the melee damage of all non-siege units by +1.

title: Tatara
description: Increase the melee damage of all non-siege units by +1.

title: Hizukuri
description: Increase the melee damage of all non-siege units by +1.

title: Kobuse-gitae
description: Increase the melee damage of all non-siege units by +1.

title: Yaki-ire
description: Increase the melee damage of all non-siege units by +1.

title: Siege Engineering
description: Melee and ranged infantry can construct Siege Towers and Battering Rams in the field.

title: Steeled Arrow
description: Increase the ranged damage of all arrows and bolts by +1.

title: Balanced Projectiles
description: Increase the ranged damage of all arrows and bolts by +1.

title: Platecutter Point
description: Increase the ranged damage of all arrows and bolts by +1.

title: Military Academy
description:
Increase the production speed of infantry, cavalry, siege, and transport units at buildings by 33%.
Does not affect religious units or other support units.

title: Fitted Leatherwork
description: Increase the melee armor of all non-siege units by +1.

title: Insulated Helm
description: Increase the melee armor of all non-siege units by +1.

title: Master Smiths
description: Increase the melee armor of all non-siege units by +1.

title: Elite Army Tactics
description: Training elite infantry leads to improved prowess in battle. Melee Infantry gain +15% damage and +15% health.

title: Iron Undermesh
description: Increase the ranged armor of all non-siege units by +1.

title: Wedge Rivets
description: Increase the ranged armor of all non-siege units by +1.

title: Angled Surfaces
description: Increase the ranged armor of all non-siege units by +1.

title: Incendiary Arrows
description: Flammable munitions grant non-gunpowder ranged units a siege arrow or bolt when attacking buildings and increase their damage by +20%.

title: Serpentine Powder
description: With new gunpowder, Handcannoneers gain +5 damage against melee infantry and gain a brief increase to their movement speed after firing their weapon.

title: Silk Bowstrings
description: Stringing bows with silk grants Archers +1 range and Mounted Archers +0.5 range.

title: Biology
description: Investing in natural sciences increases the health of all cavalry by +25%.

title: Chemistry
description: Advancements in alchemical research increase the bonus damage of all gunpowder siege weapons by +25%.

title: War Horses
description: Gilded Knights take -25% damage while charging.

title: Hill Training
description: Training in rugged terrain increases Hobelar charge damage by +125% and production speed by +100%.

title: Geometry
description: Increase damage of Trebuchets by +20%.

title: Greased Axles
description: Increase the movement speed of siege engines by +15%.

title: Roller Shutter Triggers
description: Increases Springald attack speed by +30% and grants +10% Ranged Resistance.

title: Spyglass
description: Increase the sight radius of Scouts by 30%.

title: Do-maru Armor
description: Increase Mounted Samurai move speed by +10% while Deflective Armor is active.

title: Nagae Yari
description: Spearmen are equipped with a stronger spear that increases weapon range by +20% and damage against cavalry by +15%.

title: Golden Cuirass
description: Gilded Men-at-Arms who fall below 20% health take -20% damage.

title: Heavy Torches
description: Gilded Spearman torches deal area of effect damage.

title: Scale Armor
description: Increase the ranged armor of Gilded Archers by +3.

title: Zornhau
description:
Gilded Landsknecht equip a halberd weapon that wounds enemies. When struck by this weapon, a unit will bleed for 2 damage every second. Lasts 10 seconds.
Any healing effect will remove the bleed.

title: Bodkin Bolts
description: Gilded Crossbowmen deal +20 damage against Siege units.

title: Lightweight Beams
description: Increase Battering Ram attack speed by +20% and reduce their field construction time by -50%.

title: Adjustable Crossbars
description: Increases Mangonel range by +1, blast radius by +75%, and adds +1 projectile to attacks.

title: Siege Works
description: New carpentry techniques increase the health of siege units by +20%.

title: Arrowslits
description: Add defensive arrowslits to this structure and increase garrison arrow range by +1. Only one weapon emplacement can be added.

title: Springald Emplacement
description: Add a defensive springald emplacement to this structure.

title: Cannon Emplacement
description: Add a defensive cannon emplacement to this structure.

title: Boiling Oil
description: Towers and Keeps gain a boiling oil attack against nearby units that deals 30 damage.

title: Court Architects
description: Patronage of the finest builders increases all building health by +30%.

title: Fortify Outpost
description: Add +1000 health and +5 fire armor to this Outpost.

title: Extra Hammocks
description: Increases the number of arrows fired by Archer Ships by +1.

title: Naval Arrowslits
description: Add a defensive arrowslit to this Dock which only attacks ships.

title: Composite Bows
description: Increase the attack speed of Archers by +33%.

title: Camel Rider Barding
description: Increase the armor of Camel Riders by +2.

title: Camel Handling
description: Increase the movement speed of camel military units by +15%.

title: Camel Support
description: Camels increase the armor of nearby infantry by +2.

title: Camel Rider Shields
description: Grant Camel Riders shields, improving their melee armor by +3.

title: Medical Centers
description: Town Centers and Keeps heal nearby units for +2 health every 1 second.

title: Boot Camp
description: Increase the health of all infantry by +15%.

title: Teak Masts
description: Increase the health of military ships by +10%.

title: Copper Plating
description: Improves the fire and ranged armor of ships by +2.

title:
Reinforcement
(Bonus Military Wing)
description:
Constructs the Military Wing.
Upon completion, Cavalry units gain the ability to construct siege weapons.
The House of Wisdom produces 7 Desert Raiders immediately and then every 2 minutes for the rest of the game.

title: Master Smiths
description: Increase the melee armor of all non-siege units by +1.

title: Siege Carpentry
description:
Upon completion, siege units gain access to the Structural Reinforcements ability.
Siege units gain +20 melee armor and +5 fire armor for 10 seconds.

title: Sultan's Mamluks
description: Infantry gains +25% damage and +20% movement speed for 30 seconds after defeating a unit.

title: Infantry Support
description: Infantry increase the armor of nearby camels by 3.

title: Proselytization
description: Imams can convert units without holding a Relic, but can only target a single unit.

title: Phalanx
description: Increase the attack range of Spearmen by +100%.

title: Pyrotechnics
description: Increase the range of Handcannons by +1.5.

title: Reload Drills
description: Increase the attack speed of Bombards by +33%.

title: Battle Hardened
description: Increase the health of Palace Guards by +30.

title: Handcannon Slits
description: Add defensive handcannon slits to this structure and increases garrison arrow range by +1. Only one weapon emplacement can be added.

title: Thunderclap Bombs
description: Warships fire a Nest of Bees attack.

title: Cloud of Terror
description: Adds area of effect damage to Bombards.

title: Roar of the Dragon
description: Spearmen and Horsemen gain a Fire Lance when charging.

title: Military Affairs Bureau
description: Imperial Officials can now supervise Keeps and Outposts to reduce damage taken by 35%.

title: Bolt Magazines
description: More advanced magazines allow Zhuge Nu to fire piercing bolts with +0.5 range that deal +1 damage against Light Melee Infantry.

title: 10000 Bolts
description: Zhuge Nu and Crossbowmen fire an extra bolt. The additional bolt for Crossbowmen is 40% as effective as the previous bolt.

title: Dali Horses
description: Increase the attack speed of Cavalry units by +20%.

title: Hard Cased Bombs
description: Enemy units receive +15% Ranged and Melee damage for 5 seconds when hit by a Grenade.

title: Dynastic Protectors
description: Allows production of unique cavalry units, the Imperial Guard, and the Yuan Raider.

title: Armored Beasts
description: Grant +20% health and +4 ranged armor to War Elephants.

title: Efficient Production
description: Allow Scholars to garrison in military buildings, boosting production speed by 100%.

title: Howdahs
description: Upgrade Tower Elephants to have Elite Crossbowmen as riders instead of Archers. Tower Elephants gain +25% health and +4 ranged armor.

title: Forced March
description:
Infantry units gain the Forced March ability.
When activated, infantry move +100% faster for 10 seconds, but breaks when dealing damage.

title: Zeal
description: Units healed by Scholars gain +50% attack speed for 3 seconds.

title: Honed Blades
description: Men-at-Arms and Lancers equip a Kilij, increasing their damage by +3.

title: Paiks
description: Archers and Crossbowmen gain +0.5 range.

title: Mahouts
description: Elephants move +10% faster.

title: Salvaged Materials
description: Baghlahs heal 30 health when killing an enemy unit.

title: Tranquil Venue
description: Mosques restore +4 health every second to units that are out of combat.

title: Pax Mangolica
description: Add +300 health and +3 fire armor to all Outposts.

title: Slow-Burning Defenses
description: Increase the fire armor of Stone Wall Towers, Keeps, and Outposts by +10.

title: Manuscript Trade
description: Scholars garrisoned in Docks provide +30% faster production speed and contribute to global research.

title: Crossbow Stirrups
description: Increase the attack speed of Arbalétriers by +25%.

title: Gambesons
description: Increase Arbalétrier melee armor by +5.

title: Chivalry
description: Royal Knights regenerate +1 health every 1 seconds when out of combat.

title: Companion Equipment
description: Increase Jeanne d'Arc's health and damage by 25% and gain +1 armor. Increase the health and damage of Jeanne's Companions by 20%.

title: Ordinance Company
description: Consecrated buildings also reduce the Wood and Gold cost of units by 25%.

title: Royal Bloodlines
description: Fill the stables with the best stallions, increasing all cavalry health by +35%.

title: Cantled Saddles
description: Increase Royal Knights' bonus damage after a charge from +3 to +10.

title: Long Guns
description: Increase the damage of naval cannons by +15%.

title: Slate and Stone Construction
description: All buildings gain +5 fire armor.

title: Reinforced Defenses
description: Increase the health of walls, towers, and gates by +25%.

title: Marching Drills
description: Increase the movement speed of infantry and religious units by +10%.

title: Heavy Maces
description: Men-at-Arms wield maces, increasing their bonus damage against heavy targets by +6.

title: Two-Handed Weapons
description: Men-at-Arms wield two-handed weapons, increasing their damage by +2.

title: Fire Stations
description: Military Ships regenerate +1 health every 2 seconds when out of combat.

title: Inspired Warriors
description: Prelates increase their move speed by 10% and can inspire military units, improving their armor by +1, and damage by +15%.

title: Riveted Chain Mail
description: Increase the melee armor of Spearmen and Horsemen by +2.

title: Awl Pikes
description: Increase the damage of Spearmen and Horsemen by +2.

title: Steel Barding
description: Grants Knights and Black Riders +2 melee and +2 ranged armor.

title: Network of Citadels
description: Increase the Network of Castles attack speed bonus from +20% to +30%.

title: Arrow Volley
description: Longbowmen gain Arrow Volley, an activated ability that reduces their time to attack by +1 second for a duration of 6 seconds.

title: Armor Clad
description: Increase the ranged and melee armor of Men-at-Arms by +2.

title: Admiralty
description: Increase the range of combat ships by +1.

title: Shattering Projectiles
description: Trebuchet projectiles shatter on impact, increasing their area of effect.

title: Muster the Nobles
description: Levy 5 Demilancers.

title: Shire Levy
description: Levy 12 Yeomen.

title: Exact Militia Program
description: Levy 10 Demilancers, 10 Earl's Guards, and 10 Yeomen.

title: Iron Clamps
description: Iron Clamps reinforcing the walls reduces incoming damage from gunpowder by 20% for Stone Walls and Fortresses.

title: Trebuchet Emplacement
description: Add a defensive trebuchet emplacement to this structure.

title: Banco Repairs
description: Buildings are repaired +50% faster.

title: Farima Leadership
description: Sofa increase the movement speed of nearby infantry by +15%.

title: Imported Armor
description: Increase armor of Sofa by +2.

title: Local Knowledge
description: Musofadi Warriors and Musofadi Gunners gain +5 healing with each attack for 5 seconds after coming out of stealth.

title: Poisoned Arrows
description: Archer arrows deal an additional 3 damage over 6 seconds.

title: Precision Training
description: Increase ranged damage of Donso by +6, Archers by +2, and Javelin Throwers by +3.

title: Canoe Tactics
description: Archer Ships fire an additional 2 Javelin weapons.

title: Whistling Arrows
description: Increase the Khan's Signal Arrow duration by +5 seconds and range by +2 tiles.

title: Yam Network
description: Yam speed aura applies to all units instead of just Traders and cavalry units. Does not apply to siege engines.

title: Additional Torches
description: Increase the torch damage of all infantry and cavalry by +3.

title: Steppe Lancers
description: Increase Keshik healing by +1 Health per attack and attack speed by +10%.

title: Monastic Shrines
description: Prayer Tents allow Improved Production within their influence even without an Ovoo.

title: Siha Bow Limbs
description: Increase the ranged damage of Mangudai and the Khan by +1.

title: Armored Hull
description: Increase the health of all military ships by +20% and ranged armor by +1.

title: Shipwrights
description: Increase the health of all military ships by +20% and ranged armor by +1.

title: Springald Crews
description: Springald Ships gain +1 range and attack 20% faster.

title: Incendiaries
description: Incendiary Ships gain +20% explosion range.

title: Herbal Medicine
description: Increase the healing rate of religious units and healers by +60%.

title: Piety
description: Increase the health of religious units and healers by +40.

title: Shinto Rituals
description: Increases Shinto Priest health by +40, healing rate by +60%, and movement speed by +15%.

title: Gion Festival
description: Increases the Line of Sight of all buildings by +2 tiles. Every 3 minutes, all economic units heal for 100% of their health over 3 seconds.

title: Bunrei
description: Increases the maximum number of Yorishiro by +2. Immediately produces 2 Yorishiro at the Floating Gate.

title: Zen
description: Buddhist Monks generate 25 gold every 60 seconds.

title: Nehan
description: Upgrades Buddhist Conversion to Nehan Conversion, which has a 25% shorter cooldown and additionally improves nearby allied units movement speed by +25% when cast.

title: Five Mountain Ministries
description: Buddhist Temples cast Sohei Sutra on a nearby enemy every 6 seconds.

title: Tithe Barns
description: Relics placed in a Mosque provide an income of +40 Food, +40 Wood, and +10 Stone every minute.

title: Janissary Guns
description: Increase Janissary gun damage by +4.

title: Imperial Fleet
description: Increase the production speed of Gunpowder Ships by 25% and their movement speed by 25%.

title: Advanced Academy
description: Increases military production speed by +25% and outfits Military Schools with the ability to train Lancers and Janissaries.

title: Extensive Fortifications
description: All garrison arrows are replaced with crossbow bolts, which deal +2 bonus damage vs. heavy units.

title: Akinji System
description: Enables Cavalry Archers to be trained from the Archery Range and Military School.

title: Fast Training
description: Increase production of Military Schools by +25%.

title: Field Work
description: Spawn 2 Imams at the Landmark Town Center. Imams area heal nearby units for 1 health every second. Increases to 2 health in Castle Age and 3 health in Imperial Age.

title: Janissary Company
description: Spawn 2 Janissaries for each of your Landmark Town Center and Military Schools at the Landmark Town Center.

title: Mehter Drums
description: Spawn 2 Mehter at the Landmark Town Center. Mehters increase move speed to units in the same formation by +15%.

title: Military Campus
description: Increase Military Schools that can be built by +1.

title: Siege Crews
description: Allows all siege engines to be garrisoned by infantry. While garrisoned, attack and setup speed is increased by +25%.

title: Great Bombard Emplacement
description: Add a defensive Great Bombard emplacement to this structure.

title: Fine Tuned Guns
description: Increase damage of Bombards by +20%. Bombards gain +50 damage vs Infantry.

title: Boyar's Fortitude
description: Increase the health of Rus cavalry by +25.

title: Mounted Training
description:
Increase weapon range of Horse Archers by +1 and unlock the Gallop ability.
Gallop: Activate to move at maximum speed with +2 tile weapon range for 8 seconds.

title: Knight Poleaxes
description: Knights equip a poleax, increasing their melee damage by +4.

title: Siege Crew Training
description: Setup and teardown speed of Mangonels, Trebuchets, and Bombards is instant.

title: Wandering Town
description: Ram damage increased by +25%. Rams heal 2 health every 1 second.

title: Divine Light
description: Increase the duration of Saint's Blessing by +10 seconds.

title: Fervor
description: Improve the range of Saint's Blessing by +5 tiles and the damage granted by Saint's Blessing by +1.

title: Saint's Veneration
description: Increase the health of Warrior Monks by +100.

title: Banded Arms
description: Increase the range of Springalds by +1 tiles.

title: Castle Watch
description: Increase the sight range of this Wooden Fortress by 6 tiles.

title: Castle Turret
description: Increase the damage of arrows fired from this Wooden Fortress by +2.

title: Adaptable Hulls
description: Converting between Lodya Ship types is 50% faster and no longer has a cost penalty.

title: Heavy Dromon
description:
Increases range of Dromons by 0.5 and their damage by 1.
Upgrades all Dromons to leave Greek Fire on the surface or ground where they attack.

title: Liquid Explosives
description: Incendiary Ships deal full damage to all enemies in their explosion radius.

title: Eastern Mercenary Contract
description:
Unlocks production of Keshik, Ghulam, and Tower Elephant mercenaries.
Keshik: Feudal Age
Ghulam: Veteran contract
Tower Elephant: Elite contract

title: Silk Road Mercenary Contract
description:
Unlocks production of Javelin Thrower, Camel Rider, and Grenadier mercenaries.
Javelin Thrower: Feudal Age
Camel Rider: Veteran contract
Grenadier: Elite contract

title: Western Mercenary Contract
description:
Unlocks production of Longbowman, Landsknecht, and Streltsy mercenaries.
Longbowman: Feudal Age
Landsknecht: Veteran contract
Streltsy: Elite contract

title: Veteran Contract
description: Upgrade Hardened Mercenaries to Veteran Mercenaries.

title: Elite Contract
description: Upgrade Veteran Mercenaries to Elite Mercenaries.

title: Billmen
description: Spearmen equip tempered Bills, reducing the armor of enemies by -1 when attacking.

title: Condensed Land Practices
description: Advancements in feudal land distribution practices increase the build limit of Manors by +4 and their health by +100.

title: Open Field System
description: Advancements in feudal land distribution practices increase the build limit of Manors by +4 and their health by +200.

title: Burgundian Imports
description: Importing Burgundian Handcannons enables Handcannoneers to be trained in the Castle Age and reduces Handcannoneer cost by -25%.

title: Collar of Esses
description: Your Knights and Demilancers adorn their armor with the Lancaster livery, gaining +5 bonus damage against enemy heavy units.

title: Synchronized Shot
description: Unlocks the Synchronized Shot ability for Yeomen.

title: Warwolf Trebuchet
description: Experience from building larger trebuchets increases their range by +2 and health by +50%.

title: Padded Jack
description: Equip your Yeomen and Spearmen with Padded Jacks, improving their melee armor by +3.

title: Scutage
description: The Lord of Lancaster levies a tax on all vassals to fund war efforts. Manors generate 30 gold per minute.

title: Ships of the Crown
description: Investing in bigger and better ship hulls increases Carrack damage by 20%, health by 15%, and range by 10%.

title: Throwing Dagger Drills
description:
Earl's Guards are supplied with additional Daggers when throwing, these Daggers also deal a small amount of area damage.
Earl's Guards now throw 2 Daggers but are less accurate.

title: Desert Citadels
description: Improves the Desert Outposts aura on Fortresses to also increase the armor of nearby units by +1/+1.

title: Kingdom of France
description: - Land military units are produced +15% faster and cost -5% gold.

title: Knights Hospitaller
description: - Increases civilian unit health by +30% and move speed by +10%. Increases healing from all sources by +30%.

title: Principality of Antioch
description: - Melee units gain +15% damage.

title: Angevin Empire
description: - Fortresses and Docks gain +30% Health.

title: Kingdom of Castile
description: - Units near Sacred Sites gain +20% damage and regenerate health.

title: Republic of Genoa
description: - Pilgrims generate +20% gold.

title: Kingdom of Poland
description: - All Cavalry gain +10% health and +50% charge damage.

title: Republic of Venice
description: - Reduces the change in the base buy or sell price by 75% when trading resources at the Market.

title: Teutonic Order
description: - All gold units gain +2 melee armor.

title: Rule of Templars
description: Gain +2 charge damage per nearby charging Heavy Cavalry.

title: Brigandine
description: Common soldiers are equipped with more resistant armor. Light cavalry gain +2 armor.

title: Counterweight Defenses
description: All Trebuchet weapons gain +1 additional projectiles.

title: Cranequins
description: Crossbows are able to load stronger bolts that have +0.5 range and +2 damage.

title: Fanaticism
description: Templar Brothers and Commanderie units gain +10% damage when below 50% health, and +30% when below 25% health.

title: Explosives
description: Increase the damage of Incendiary Ships by +40%.

title: Heated Shot
description: Archer Ship arrows light enemy Ships on fire, dealing damage over time.

title: Swivel Cannon
description: Springald Ships gain an additional Cannon which fires in 360 degrees.

title: Oda Tactics
description: Tactics from powerful daimyo improves melee infantry, increasing their damage by +15%, torch damage by +15%, and +15% health.

title: Daimyo Manor
description:
Increases the production cap of Bannerman Samurai by +1 and provides a free Villager.
Increases Town Center health by +1000, adds an additional arrow slit, and adds an aura which enhances Villagers harvest rate from Farms by +20%.

title: Daimyo Palace
description:
Increases the production cap of Bannerman Samurai by +2 and provides a free Villager.
Increases Town Center health by +2000, fire armor by +2, adds an additional arrow slit, and adds an aura which enhances Villagers harvest rate from Farms by +40%.

title: Shogunate Castle
description:
Increases the production cap of Bannerman Samurai by +3 and provides a free Villager.
Increases Town Center health by +3000, fire armor by +3, adds an aura which enhances Villagers harvest rate from Farms by +60%, and equips a Rocket Emplacement.

title: Kabura-ya Whistling Arrow
description: Onna-Musha fire a whistling arrow when an enemy is seen, increasing move speed for 10 seconds.

title: Odachi
description: Equip Samurai with an Odachi, a long sword that deals +4 bonus damage against infantry.

title: Border Settlements
description: Increase House line of sight by 7 tiles and improve their construction speed by 500%.

title: Expilatores
description: Horseman damage vs. Workers increased by +2. Workers eliminated by your Horsemen reward +30 Gold.

title: Trapezites
description: Scouts enhance the torch damage of nearby units by 25%

title: Greek Fire Projectiles
description: Counterweight Trebuchets deal +30% increased damage and engulf their target with Greek Fire, dealing area damage. Greek Fire does not stack with other patches.

title: Numeri
description: Enemy units hit by Trample become vulnerable and receive +15% increased damage for 12 seconds.

title: Teardrop Shields
description: Increase the armor of Cataphracts by +1, move speed of Limitanei by +15%, and attack speed of Varangian Guard by +15%.

title: Ferocious Speed
description: Varangian Guard increase their move speed by +30% when activating Berserking.

title: Bechhead Ram
description: Rams gain an ability that will immobilize themselves, gaining strong defensive bonuses and allowing to fire multiple arrows.

title: Earthen Core Walls
description: Increase Fortified Outpost and Palisade fire armor by +3 and health by +300.

title: Glorious Charge
description: Adds the Glorious Charge ability to Outposts, when activated it starts a 10 second timer which reveals the Outpost and the nearby area to all players, when the timer ends all nearby allied units will get +50% movement speed and take -15% less damage for 30 seconds.

title: Building Carts
description:
Produces 2 Building Carts which can be unpacked into a Military Building.
An additional building cart is produced when advancing to later Ages.

title: Muscovy Yasak
description:
The conquered Rus territories will provide larger shields to Heavy Infantry and Heavy Cavalry, increasing their ranged armor by +2. 
Wood will also be generated at the rate of 200 per minute, but it is reduced by 2 Wood for each unit equipped with a Rus shield.

title: Relic Ovoos
description: Shamans can consume a held Relic to build an Ovoo which can exceed the build limit. Increases Ovoo Stone gather rate by 20%.

title: Stone Armies
description: The Golden Tent can rapidly produce unique units at a discounted Stone cost, Torguud Stone cost and production speed are decreased by 20%, and Rus Tributes are upgraded with increased armor and a bardiche axe.

title: Yam Network Trade
description: The Golden Tent will generate 10 Gold every 10 seconds for each Fortified Outpost, up to a maximum of 6 Fortified Outposts.

title: Increased Supplies
description: Increases production speed of Military Buildings by +50%.

title: Battlefield Salvage
description: Kharash are equipped with shields, gaining +2 ranged armor, +2 melee armor, and increase their health by +25.

title: Padded Armor
description: Increase Torguud and Horseman ranged and melee armor by +1 and health by +20

title: Archery Range Reinforcements
description: Archery Range batch production increased by +1, does not increase resource cost or time to recruit.

title: Barracks Reinforcements
description: Barracks batch production increased by +1, does not increase resource cost or time to recruit.

title: Stables Reinforcements
description: Stables batch production increased by +1, does not increase resource cost or time to recruit. The Torguud batch production is also increased by +1.

title: Triple Shot
description: Kipchak Archers fire 2 additional arrows that each deal 70% less damage.

title: Reinforced Arm Ballista
description: Upgrade Ballista Elephants into Elite Ballista Elephants

title: Collateral Damage
description: Bonus damage dealt by Elephants is increased by 30%.

title: Curse of Auliya
description: Attackers of this Tughlaqabad Fort are struck by fear, reducing their attack speed by 30% while targeting the Fort.

title: Elephant Caretakers
description: Elephants regenerate +2 health every 2 seconds when out of combat.

title: Neza Training
description: Spearman damage against cavalry increased by 35% and production speed increased by 50%.

title: Khanda Drills
description: Khanda training improves Man-at-Arms charge duration by 3 seconds and increases damage of their charge attack by 100%.

title: Higoyumi
description: Grants +1 damage to Yumi Ashigaru.

title: Horse Training
description: Cavalry movement speed is increased by 10%.

title: Kampo Medicine
description: The Ikko-ikki Monk attack aura healing Increased by +1.

title: Nenbutsu
description: Increase Ikko-ikki Monk health +60 and melee damage +2.

title: Improved Yari
description: Increase Yari Cavalry anti-cavalry damage by +2.

title: Lightweight Blades
description: Increases Spearmen move speed by +10% and +5 damage vs. Workers.

title: Samurai Bow
description: Naginata Samurai can fire a Yumi periodically from range.

title: Cross Folded Armor
description: Increase Barracks infantry ranged armor by +2.

title: Fortifications
description:
Increase the health of all buildings by 10%.

Can be researched twice in Feudal, Castle and Imperial Age, for a total of 6 times.

title: Blade Inlaying
description:
Increase the damage of all Cavalry by 1.

Can be researched twice in Feudal, Castle and Imperial Age, for a total of 6 times.

title: Scale Barding
description:
Increase the armor of all Cavalry by 1 and health by 5%.

Can be researched twice in Feudal, Castle and Imperial Age, for a total of 6 times.

title: Pattern Welding
description:
Increase the damage of all Melee Infantry by 1.

Can be researched twice in Feudal, Castle and Imperial Age, for a total of 6 times.

title: Butted Chainmail
description:
Increase the armor of all Melee Infantry by 1 and health by 5%.

Can be researched twice in Feudal, Castle and Imperial Age, for a total of 6 times.

title: Prolonged Siege
description: Siege units will deal 10% additional damage for every 10 seconds they are set up - to a maximum of 50%.

title: Sharpening Stones
description:
Increase the ranged damage of all arrows and bolts by +1.

Can be researched twice in Feudal, Castle and Imperial Age, for a total of 6 times.

title: Lamellar Armor
description: Industrious blacksmithing yields stronger lamellar armor for the army. All Cavalry and Melee Infantry health increased by +25%.

title: Rhomphaia
description: Varangian Guards and Riddari equip a powerful Rhomphaia sword, increasing light infantry damage of Guards by 3, and damage of Riddari by 3.

title: Roman Fire
description: Springalds gain 15% attack speed and engulf their projectiles with fire, creating a patch of Greek Fire after impact.

title: Ruinous Blinding
description: Varangian Arsenals craft more lethal arrows, causing units hit by Bogmaðr to have their damage reduced by 20% for 5 seconds.

title: Iron Fittings
description:
Increase the health of all siege units by 5%.

Can be researched twice in Feudal, Castle and Imperial Age, for a total of 6 times.

title: Quilted Armor
description: Utilizing local hunters' craftsmanship, Mohe Tribesman equip new armor which reduces bonus damage taken by -50%.

title: Lightweight Frames
description: Increase the movement speed of siege engines by +10%.

title: Bed Crossbow Emplacement
description: Add a defensive Bed Crossbow Emplacement to this building.

title: Meng'an Mouke Emplacement
description:
Add a Meng'an Mouke emplacement to this Structure that rallies 5 Defenders whenever enemies are nearby. Defenders cannot be controlled and will attack threats close to this emplacement.
Produces 1 global Meng'an Mouke Defender every 60 seconds.

title: Naval Crossbows
description: War Junks are equipped with repeating Bed Crossbows, firing a burst of 2 piercing bolts.

title: Porcupine Defense
description: Reinforce Nest of Bees with pointy Fire Lances which deal 10 damage back to melee attackers.

title: Rain of Fire
description: Keeps and Stone Wall Towers gain a grenade attack against nearby units that deals explosive damage. Enemies beware.

title: Reinforced Axles
description: Further increase the movement speed of siege engines by another +10%.

title: Storm Lances
description: Spearmen are equipped with Storm Lances, gaining an explosive ranged attack on a cooldown.

title: Platecutter Point
description: Increase the ranged damage of all arrows and bolts by +1.

title: Flying Fire Battalions
description: The Jin Dynasty consolidates its power and reinforces the Meng'an Mouke system to face incoming threats. Defenders are now supported by Mounted Grenadiers, and the available number of Defenders is increased by +10.

title: Heaven Shaking Thunder
description: The thunderous sounds of Eruptor and Storm Lance weapons scares enemy cavalry, reducing the damage of nearby cavalry by 20% for 5 seconds.

title: Padded Lamellar
description: Industrious blacksmithing yields stronger lamellar armor for the army. All Cavalry and Melee Infantry health increased by +25%.

title: Pili Pao
description: Explosive Grenades hurled by Trebuchets and Nest of Bees smoke out enemy defenders, reducing attacked building damage by 20% for 8 seconds. Trebuchets and Nest of Bees gain +1 range.

title: Tower Shields
description: Equipping tall tower shields grants Men-at-Arms +3 ranged armor.
